items.name: MacBook Pro 14" (M3 Max, 64GB RAM)
items.description: My primary workstation. Quiet, battery-efficient, and easily handles local LLMs and heavy builds.

items.name: Apple Studio Display
items.description: 5K resolution matches macOS scaling perfectly, minimizing eye strain during long coding sessions.

items.name: HHKB Professional HYBRID Type-S
items.description: Silent Topre switches in a compact, ergonomic layout that has cured my wrist fatigue.

items.name: Visual Studio Code (with Tokyo Night)
items.description: A customized, distraction-free environment paired with Vim keybindings and system monospace fonts.

items.name: Arc Browser
items.description: Replaces standard browser tabs with sidebar spaces, making research categorization much cleaner.

items.name: Tailscale
items.description: Zero-config mesh VPN that seamlessly links my phone, laptop, and home server.
